caption: A screen recording displays a web browser window featuring a digital presentation titled "Rural Community Food System." The main content area contains a section labeled "Introduction," which asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community?" and provides instructions on contributing to the model. Below this, a "Session Videos" list contains multiple date-stamped links, such as "10.07.2019" and "10.14.2019." To the right of the text is a complex conceptual map with various nodes and connecting lines. In the top right corner, a small webcam feed shows a man with glasses and a grey shirt looking at the screen. As the video progresses, a white mouse cursor moves across the screen, transitioning from the text section toward the conceptual map on the right, while the presenter remains stationary in his video feed.
